message: 🌱 Add etcd: Can not go get benchmark CLI tool mission (#596)

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,75 @@
+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "etcd-12526-can-not-go-get-benchmark-cli-tool",
+  "missionClass": "solution",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "etcd: Can not go get benchmark CLI tool",
+    "description": "Can not go get benchmark CLI tool. Requested by 10+ users.",
+    "type": "feature",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Check current etcd deployment",
+        "description": "Verify your etcd version and configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n etcd -l app.kubernetes.io/name=etcd\nhelm list -n etcd 2>/dev/null || echo \"Not installed via Helm\"\n```\nThis feature requires a working etcd installation."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review etcd configuration",
+        "description": "Inspect the relevant etcd configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get all -n etcd -l app.kubernetes.io/name=etcd\nkubectl get configmap -n etcd -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=etcd\n```\ngo version go1.15.1 linux/amd64\nUsing  `go get go.etcd.io/etcd/tools/benchmark` results in:\n\n`go get go.etcd.io/etcd/tools/benchmark: module go.etcd.io/etcd found (v3.3.25+incompatible), but does not contain package go.etcd.io/etcd/tools/benchmark`"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for Can not go get benchmark CLI tool",
+        "description": "I noticed a lot of users mentioning `go get go.etcd.io/etcd/tools/benchmark` does not work for the `benchmark` tool. This updates the instructions to avoid confusion. I am not sure if the goal is to get it to work with `go get`, but I would suggest we open a follow-up issue if we want to.\n```yaml\ngo build ; \ngo install\n```"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Verify the feature works",
+        "description": "Test that the new capability is working as expected:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n etcd -l app.kubernetes.io/name=etcd\nkubectl get events -n etcd --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10\n```\nConfirm the feature described in \"Can not go get benchmark CLI tool\" is functioning correctly."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "I noticed a lot of users mentioning `go get go.etcd.io/etcd/tools/benchmark` does not work for the `benchmark` tool. This updates the instructions to avoid confusion. I am not sure if the goal is to get it to work with `go get`, but I would suggest we open a follow-up issue if we want to.",
+      "codeSnippets": [
+        "go build ; \ngo install"
+      ]
+    }
+  },
+  "metadata": {
+    "tags": [
+      "etcd",
+      "graduated",
+      "orchestration",
+      "feature"
+    ],
+    "cncfProjects": [
+      "etcd"
+    ],
+    "targetResourceKinds": [],
+    "difficulty": "advanced",

+      "feature"
+    ],

+    "sourceUrls": {
+      "issue": "https://github.com/etcd-io/etcd/issues/12526",

+      "pr": "https://github.com/etcd-io/etcd/pull/13027"
+    },
+    "reactions": 10,
+    "comments": 8,
+    "synthesizedBy": "copilot"
+  },
+  "prerequisites": {
+    "kubernetes": ">=1.24",
+    "tools": [
+      "kubectl"
+    ],
+    "description": "A running Kubernetes cluster with etcd installed or the issue environment reproducible."
+  },
